rationale: The citing paper’s note emphasizes a structural demand–supply framework with manufacturer–downstream pricing interactions and price endogeneity handling, which closely aligns with the cited paper’s core contribution of jointly modeling household demand, manufacturer wholesale pricing, and multiproduct retailer pricing (also with endogeneity tests). Given this strong methodological overlap, the cited work is plausibly a substantive method/foundation source rather than an incidental mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
